song_details.name: Sri Guru Guha
song_details.arohanam: S R1 M1 P D2 Ṡ ||
song_details.avarohanam: Ṡ D2 P M1 R2 S ||

content.swara: S - D P M D || P - M - R - S || R - - sr m p d r ||
content.sahitya: Sri guru gu ha ta ra ya Su mam - Sara vana bhava

content.swara: S - D P M D || pdsd pm - rm pm rs || R - - sr m p d r ||
content.sahitya: Sri guru gu ha ta ra ya - - Su mam - Sara vana bhava

content.swara: S - D P M D || pdsd pm - rm pm rs || R - - - s s d r ||
content.sahitya: Sri guru gu ha ta ra ya - - Su mam - - sura pati

content.swara: S m r d d p d s d r s || m r s r s d - s d p m p d ||
content.sahitya: Sri pati rati pati vak-pati kshiti pati pasu pati se - vita (sri )

content.swara: D - D - P - D || M P R M P - D || M - R S R S ||
content.sahitya: ra ga di ra hi ta hrda ya vi bha vita sura

content.swara: R M P D M P ||
D - R - sr- S || - S s d d s p D p ||
content.sahitya: tya ga dhi- ra ja ku- - - ma-ra

content.swara: S - P - P D || M P M - R - S ||
content.sahitya: ta pa traya ha ra ku ma - ra

content.swara: S d - r - s- m r m - P d || M P D - s d - - R s ||
content.sahitya: bhogi ra - ja vinu ta pada bhu de va kriya - moda

content.swara: R m - r - r - S s - D d || M r - s D - s r m P d ||
content.sahitya: yogi ra - ja yo ga bheda yukta ma no laya vinoda

content.swara: S - D P M D || pdsd pm - rm pm rs || R - - - s s d r ||
content.sahitya: Sri guru gu ha ta ra ya - - Su mam - - sura pati
